zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Throckmorton於大約1251年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Robert de Throckmorton II22歲，母親Prudence de Compton17歲。他於1270年與Isabel De Donnisley在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1315年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Throckmorton于大约1251年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Robert de Throckmorton II22岁，母亲Prudence de Compton17岁。他于1270年与Isabel De Donnisley在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1315年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Throckmorton was born about 1251, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Throckmorton II, was 22 and his mother, Prudence de Compton, was 17. He married Isabel De Donnisley in 1270, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1315, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Throckmorton est né environ 1251, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Throckmorton II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Prudence de Compton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Isabel De Donnisley en 1270, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Throckmorton um 1251 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Throckmorton II 22 und seine Mutter Prudence de Compton 17. Er hat 1270 in Worcestershire, England Isabel De Donnisley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Throckmorton è nato il circa 1251 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Throckmorton II, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Prudence de Compton, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Isabel De Donnisley nel 1270, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1315, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Throckmortonが約1251年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Throckmorton IIは22歳，母Prudence de Comptonは17歳であった。1270年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでIsabel De Donnisleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1315年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Throckmorton(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Throckmorton II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Prudence de Compton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1270년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Isabel De Donnisley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1315년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Throckmorton nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Throckmorton II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Prudence de Compton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Donnisley em 1270, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1315, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Throckmorton родился около 1251 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Throckmorton II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Prudence de Compton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Donnisley в 1270 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1315 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Throckmorton nació aproximadamente 1251, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Throckmorton II, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Prudence de Compton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Isabel De Donnisley en 1270, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1315, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
